div.class: tw-bg-[#f5f5f7] tw-min-h-[calc(100vh-140px)] tw-w-full tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-items-center tw-pt-6 tw-pb-8 tw-font-['Urbanist']
tw-w-full tw-max-w-[1200px] tw-px-4 md:tw-px-8 tw-mb-4 tw-flex tw-justify-start
tw-bg-white tw-rounded-[12px] tw-px-5 tw-py-2.5 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-3 tw-shadow-sm tw-w-max tw-border tw-border-gray-100

a.class: tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-2 tw-text-gray-600 hover:tw-text-[#0f172a] tw-no-underline tw-transition-colors

div.class: tw-bg-white tw-rounded-[32px] tw-w-full tw-h-auto tw-relative tw-shadow-[0px_8px_40px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] tw-p-6 md:tw-p-8 tw-flex tw-flex-col

a.class: tw-w-[36px] tw-h-[36px] md:tw-w-[40px] md:tw-h-[40px] tw-rounded-full tw-bg-black tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center hover:tw-bg-gray-800 tw-transition-colors

button.class: tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-medium tw-text-[14px] tw-text-[#5155fa] tw-bg-transparent tw-border-none tw-cursor-pointer hover:tw-underline tw-p-0

h1.class: tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-semibold tw-text-[24px] md:tw-text-[28px] tw-text-[#212529] tw-mb-4 tw-text-left

div.class: tw-relative tw-w-full tw-h-[180px] md:tw-h-[220px] tw-bg-[rgba(0,0,0,0.02)] tw-border-2 tw-border-dashed tw-border-[rgba(0,0,0,0.53)] tw-rounded-[16px] tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-cursor-pointer hover:tw-bg-[rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] tw-transition-colors tw-group tw-overflow-hidden

span.class: tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-medium tw-text-[14px] md:tw-text-[16px] tw-text-[rgba(0,0,0,0.53)] group-hover:tw-text-black tw-transition-colors

div.class: tw-hidden tw-absolute tw-inset-0 tw-p-2 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-bg-white/90 tw-backdrop-blur-sm
tw-absolute tw-inset-0 tw-bg-black/40 tw-opacity-0 hover:tw-opacity-100 tw-transition-opacity tw-rounded-[12px] tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-m-2

span.class: tw-text-white tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-medium tw-text-[14px] tw-bg-black/50 tw-px-4 tw-py-2 tw-rounded-full

p.class: tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[11px] md:tw-text-[12px] tw-text-red-500 tw-mt-2 tw-mb-0 tw-text-left

button.class: tw-w-full tw-h-[44px] md:tw-h-[48px] tw-bg-[#1a1a1a] tw-rounded-[24px] tw-flex tw-justify-center tw-items-center tw-mt-6 hover:tw-bg-black tw-transition-colors tw-cursor-pointer tw-border-none

span.class: tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-font-normal tw-text-[13px] md:tw-text-[14px] tw-text-white tw-uppercase tw-font-bold tw-tracking-widest

div.class: tw-hidden tw-fixed tw-inset-0 tw-z-[9999] tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-bg-black/50 tw-backdrop-blur-sm tw-font-['Urbanist'] tw-px-4
tw-bg-white tw-rounded-[24px] tw-w-full tw-max-w-[400px] tw-p-6 tw-shadow-2xl tw-animate-[fadeIn_0.2s_ease-out]

button.class: tw-w-8 tw-h-8 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-rounded-full hover:tw-bg-gray-100 tw-text-gray-500 hover:tw-text-black tw-transition-colors tw-border-none tw-bg-transparent tw-cursor-pointer

div.p: Jika Anda mengalami kendala saat melakukan verifikasi KTM, pastikan beberapa hal berikut:

ul.class: tw-text-[13px] tw-text-gray-600 tw-list-disc tw-pl-4 tw-space-y-2 tw-mb-6
ul.li: Foto KTM Anda terlihat jelas dan tidak buram.
Pencahayaan cukup terang saat Anda mengambil foto.
Seluruh bagian (tepi) KTM Anda masuk ke dalam frame foto.
Ukuran file maksimal yang diperbolehkan adalah 5MB.

a.class: tw-w-full tw-flex tw-justify-center tw-items-center tw-py-3.5 tw-bg-[#f5f5f7] hover:tw-bg-gray-200 tw-text-black tw-rounded-[16px] tw-font-semibold tw-text-[14px] tw-transition-colors tw-no-underline
